description_long: This structure is a large, wooden half-pipe with high vertical walls and a flat central platform, resembling a skateboarding ramp rather than a traditional dam. The surface is constructed from light-colored wood panels, with visible seams and some graffiti art on the sides and floor. Metal railings run along the top edges for safety, and a staircase with a landing platform is attached to one end, providing access to the upper level. The interior is hollow, with curved transitions between the floor and walls, and the overall form is rectangular with a cutout in the upper wall. The structure is elevated on short supports, and the wood grain texture is prominent throughout, giving it a natural yet urban appearance.
description: A large, wooden half-pipe structure with metal railings, graffiti, and a staircase, resembling a skateboarding ramp. The surface is light wood with visible seams and urban markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat wooden wall with a central cutout, metal railings, and the staircase leading to the upper platform.
description_view_1: End view revealing the curved interior of the half-pipe, graffiti on the floor, and the staircase at the far end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with prominent graffiti on the wall and a clear view of the wooden end platform.
description_view_3: View from the other end, highlighting the open half-pipe interior, railings, and the staircase structure.
